highlights: MIA Photo Fair 2026 in Milan concludes today with the theme 'Metamorphosis'.
Ongoing exhibition 'Radical Possibilities: Art in Protest' at Crooked Tree Arts Center.
Art by the Sea Youth Arts Festival taking place in Miami Beach today.

stocks.marketContext: Seoul stock market saw extreme volatility earlier in March 2026, with historic plunges and rebounds linked to Middle East geopolitical events. Despite this, the KOSPI remains one of the year's top performers with a 33.7% gain year-to-date through March 20.
